allow: Bash(python3 -c "import pytrends; print\('ok'\)" 2>&1 || echo "pytrends not installed")

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"idea":"attorney helper ai apps"}' 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/trends/hn \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"query":"legal attorney lawyer"}' 2>&1 || echo "No HN route — checking path"
ls /Users/mac/unbuilt/unbuilt/app/api/trends/)

Bash(curl -s "https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search?query=legal+attorney+lawyer&tags=story&numericFilters=created_at_i>$\(date -v-30d +%s 2>/dev/null || date -d '30 days ago' +%s\)&hitsPerPage=10&attributesToRetrieve=objectID,title,points,num_comments,created_at,url&attributesToHighlight=none" 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool | head -30)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=legal+attorney+lawyer+created:>$\(date -v-7d +%Y-%m-%d 2>/dev/null || date -d '7 days ago' +%Y-%m-%d\)&sort=stars&order=desc&per_page=8" \\
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github.v3+json" 2>&1 | python3 -m json.tool | head -20)

Bash(curl -s "https://itunes.apple.com/search?term=project+management&entity=software&limit=3" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['resultCount'],'results'\); [print\(r['trackName'],'-',r['averageUserRating'],'stars,',r['userRatingCount'],'ratings'\) for r in d['results']]")
